narrative_beat: Close site institucional em monitor com dedo apontando linha destacada

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: a close-up of a finger pointing at a highlighted golden line on a retroilluminated monitor screen displaying an institutional document page, with no legible text but one line glowing brighter than the rest
subject.focal_point: the golden highlighted line where the finger points
subject.secondary: Monitor bezels visible. Dim room behind.

environment.location: a dark home office or study

composition.foreground: finger and golden line in warm tones
composition.background: desaturated black-and-white monitor and dark room

lighting.key_light: monitor screen backlight as primary source

style.post_processing: halation, crushed blacks, amber highlights, anamorphic lens flares
style.texture_detail: 35mm film grain, dust particles, floating orange embers

symbolism.primary: the proof is public — date, signature, and stamp
symbolism.secondary: finger as the act of accusation

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
photorealistic documentary cinematography, not illustrated or cartoon
analog film photography aesthetic, no digital art flatness
muted desaturated background palette, warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
